negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing SynchronousScheduler/SchedulerContract instance API that exposes the constructed scheduler address. The port has a global/env get_scheduler_address helper and optional address parameters, but no SynchronousScheduler object returning its stored SchedulerContract address.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual_scheduled_verification::get_scheduler_address returns env/default address, which covers global default lookup but not the initialized SynchronousScheduler instance invariant.

rationale: Current local evidence shows get_scheduler_address returning self.scheduler_contract.address(), and SchedulerContract::address() returns the stored address field.
statement: SynchronousScheduler::get_scheduler_address must return the scheduler contract address that the scheduler was initialized or constructed with.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct a scheduler with a non-default SchedulerContract address and assert get_scheduler_address returns that stored address.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Search for SynchronousScheduler and SchedulerContract::address in local repos; both are absent.
title: SynchronousScheduler exposes configured scheduler address
